title: Process and interpret data
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Process and interpret data demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Retrieve and check data

pcs.text: Retrieve data using appropriate files and/or application software
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Retrieve data using appropriate files and/or application software?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Retrieve data using appropriate files and/or application software.

pcs.text: Verify the quality of data using workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify the quality of data using workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify the quality of data using workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Rectify errors in data using workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Rectify errors in data using workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Rectify errors in data using workplace procedures.

elements.title: Calculate scientific quantities

pcs.text: Calculate statistical values for given data

pcs.text: Calculate scientific quantities using given formulae and data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate scientific quantities using given formulae and data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate scientific quantities using given formulae and data.

pcs.text: Ensure calculated quantities are consistent with estimations and expectations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure calculated quantities are consistent with estimations and expectations.

pcs.text: Report all calculated quantities using the appropriate units and correct number of significant figures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report all calculated quantities using the appropriate units and correct number of significant figures.
